Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (243 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (243 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (233 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label.
